subject: Prinplup, a blue penguin-like creature mid-leap above icy water, wings spread wide
description: Prinplup leaps dynamically above a shimmering icy water surface, wings fully extended and body tilted forward in a confident soaring pose. The creature is rendered in shades of blue and navy with a yellow beak and forehead crest. Ice fragments and water spray scatter beneath it. The background is a pale icy blue sky with glacial formations suggesting an arctic or sub-polar coastal environment. The composition is energetic and upward-moving.
foreground: Prinplup in flight above water spray and ice fragments
background: Pale icy sky, glacial formations, shimmering frozen water surface
